extraction.one_line_summary: KITTEL Marcel won sprint Stage 11 with late-race positioning from 200m out after BODNAR Maciej's solo attempt collapsed inside final 500m
tactical_patterns: BODNAR Maciej's 30km solo attack maintained 40s at 10km-to-go, collapsing only inside 500m despite sustained peloton speeds.
FROOME Chris positioned himself near front in final kilometers of flat stage, prioritizing crash avoidance over energy conservation.
KITTEL Marcel demonstrated wheel-switching sprint positioning described as 'jumping from wheel to wheel' with SABATINI Fabio leading out.

rider_signals.KITTEL Marcel: positive: Fifth stage win demonstrates peak sprint form combining power with gap-finding positioning ability
rider_signals.BODNAR Maciej: positive: Sustained solo effort at time-trial power for 30+km shows exceptional diesel engine capacity
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: Tactical nervousness led to uncharacteristic front positioning in sprint finale, may indicate team confidence issues
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: Early crash with wrist injury requiring multiple medical consultations ahead of Pyrenees mountain stage
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: Suffered flat tire plus subsequent crash with teammate GOGL Michael, body language showing visible frustration
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: Mentioned among GC riders with crash trouble during stage
rider_signals.CATALDO Dario: negative: Abandoned Tour after early stage crash, reducing Astana support for ARU Fabio
